caption: A man with a bald head, wearing a black suit jacket over a white collared shirt, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in front of a blurred background showing other people in a professional setting, including men in casual attire like green and blue shirts. A small microphone is attached to his cheek. A graphic overlay at the bottom of the scene includes the name "SANJEEV MOHAN" and the title "Principal, SanjMo | @SanjMo" in the top frames, while the bottom frames display "MONGODB WORLD 2022" and "#MDW22 | #theCUBE". Both sections feature the "theCUBE" logo and the text "From the Javits Center, New York, NY", alongside a "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo. As the scene progresses, the man moves his hands to emphasize his points, shifting from a neutral pose to raising his right hand and eventually gesturing with both hands.
